subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-06-23
subcodes.first_line: These people are following their false imaginings. They say that the letter from the Bab to Yahya begins thus
subcodes.first_line_orig: چگونه بوهم متمسکند میگویند در اول توقیع حضرت اعلی بیحیی این عبارتست
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings
